description: A student studying late at the library wants a security escort to walk them back to their dorm.

nodes.task_description: Gather the student's name, current location (library), and destination (dorm building).

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary logistical information.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a student safety patrol member or a security officer to the student's location.
Provide the student with an estimated arrival time for the escort.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the student that the escort will arrive in 5-10 minutes.
